doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The EDPB does not use this document format, the legal position contradicts established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data, and the future date (2026) with non-existent case reference confirms fabrication.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The EDPB does not use "Guidance Note" nomenclature with year/number format like "04/2026," the stated position contradicts established EDPB guidance that pseudonymized data remains personal data under GDPR regardless of key-holder status, and no such 2026 document exists.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The EDPB does not use this document format, the legal position contradicts established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains personal data, and the future date (2026) with non-existent case reference confirms fabrication.
